text:
On Wed, 10 Jan 2007 18:41:10 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-themes/murrine-configurator,
>
> Please note that PR ports/107764 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Approve.  Thank you, Edwin.

- Ted
